originalTitle: Netflix is using an AI-generated Gene Wilder voice in its Willy Wonka reality show
summary: A new teaser trailer confirmed that Wonka's The Golden Ticket will premiere on Netflix on September 23rd, following its Squid Game reality show in the trend of creating real competitions based on fictional torture scenarios. While the sets seen in the trailer are real and not some Glasgow-style AI fakes, the voiceover is AI-generated. Deadline […]
content: A new teaser trailer confirmed that Wonka’s The Golden Ticket will premiere on Netflix on September 23rd, following its Squid Game reality show in the trend of creating real competitions based on fictional torture scenarios. While the sets seen in the trailer are real and not some Glasgow-style AI fakes, the voiceover is AI-generated. Deadline reports that Netflix worked with AI audio company ElevenLabs with consent from Wilder’s family, after working on productions re-creating the voice of Michael Caine and Stan Lee. It also continues Netflix’s 2021 partnership with the Roald Dahl company, and is separate from the Charlie vs. the Chocolate Factory animated feature that will arrive in 2027. As for the show itself, Netflix says its “high-stakes social experiment” will feature 12 “lucky” golden ticket winners plus their chosen partner in the competition, with one champion left standing a week later during the two-part finale on September 30th.
chineseTitle: Netflix 在其《威利旺卡》真人秀中使用 AI 生成的吉恩·怀尔德声音
chineseSummary: 最新预告片证实，《旺卡》的《金票》将于 9 月 23 日在 Netflix 首播，继《乌贼游戏》真人秀之后，又顺应基于虚构酷刑场景打造真实竞赛的趋势。虽然预告片中看到的场景是真实的，而不是一些格拉斯哥风格的人工智能赝品，但画外音是人工智能生成的。最后期限 […]
chineseContent: 最新预告片证实，《旺卡》的《金票》将于 9 月 23 日在 Netflix 首播，继《乌贼游戏》真人秀节目之后，根据虚构的酷刑场景打造真实比赛的趋势。虽然预告片中看到的场景是真实的，而不是一些格拉斯哥风格的人工智能赝品，但画外音是人工智能生成的。据 Deadline 报道，在重新制作迈克尔·凯恩和斯坦·李的声音后，Netflix 在得到怀尔德家人的同意后与人工智能音频公司 ElevenLabs 合作。它还延续了 Netflix 与罗尔德·达尔公司 2021 年的合作伙伴关系，并且与将于 2027 年推出的《查理大战巧克力工厂》动画长片分开。至于该剧本身，Netflix 表示，其“高风险社会实验”将由 12 名“幸运”金奖获得者和他们选择的合作伙伴参加比赛，一周后，在 9 月 30 日的两部分结局中，将留下一名冠军。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
